{{Relic Infobox|Lost Wisp|2}}
{{R|Lost Wisp||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|The Lost Wisp|2}} event. Whenever you play a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Power|Power|2}}, it deals 8 damage to '''ALL''' enemies.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|The Lost Wisp|2}} event by selecting the {{Frame|Capture the Wisp}} option and adding a {{C|Decay||2}} to your Deck.
